title: WEATHERIZATION - 211info
text: ACCESS WEATHERIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weatherization services to help reduce energy costs. Services may include insulation, heating duct repairs, air filtration, and other efficiency upgrades. Assistance is based on availability of funding and no emergency assistance is available. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Households must not exceed annual income guidelines for household size. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 779-6691 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-6691 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information. Program has a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application, proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
